seo.metaTitle: White-Label SEO Platform for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Launch guided SEO under your brand. Search Engine Assist helps telcos, ISPs, and MSPs deliver task-based SEO to SMBs — driving activation, ARPU, and retention.

hero.headline: Guided SEO That SMBs Actually Use — Under Your Brand
hero.subheadline: Most SMBs know they should invest in SEO. They don't have the expertise or budget to do it. Agency-grade tools are overkill. They need guided, step-by-step SEO they can execute themselves.
hero.description: Search Engine Assist is a white-label, task-based SEO platform that walks SMBs through the actions that improve their search rankings — with customized plans, keyword tracking, and progress reporting. All under your brand.
hero.badge: DIY SEO platform, white-labeled for partners

items.title: Follow a clear SEO roadmap
items.body: Customized plans based on their industry, location, website platform, and current rankings — no guesswork.

items.title: Execute tasks step by step
items.body: Guided instructions and video walkthroughs for every SEO action, built for non-experts.

items.title: Track keyword rankings
items.body: Monitor up to 20 keywords with search volume, competitiveness, and ranking history data.

items.title: See measurable progress
items.body: Monthly reports show completed tasks, ranking improvements, and recommended next steps.

features.heading: SEO Made Simple for SMBs — Scalable for You
features.intro: Search Engine Assist is designed for non-expert SMBs and built for partners who need scale without support overhead.

cards.title: Customized SEO Plans
cards.body: Onboarding generates a tailored roadmap based on industry, geography, website platform, and current search performance — so every SMB starts with relevant actions.

cards.title: Guided Task Execution
cards.body: Step-by-step instructions with clear explanations and video walkthroughs. SMBs complete SEO tasks month by month without needing to understand the technical details.

cards.title: Keyword & Ranking Tracking
cards.body: Keyword recommendations based on search volume and competitiveness. Ranking history, indexing checks for Google and Bing, and local competitor benchmarking.

cards.title: Automated Reporting
cards.body: Monthly email reports showing ranking progress, completed tasks, and next steps — giving SMBs visibility and giving your team data for upsell conversations.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Capture SMB SEO Spend — Without Building an Agency
partnerAdvantage.intro: SEO is one of the highest-demand digital services for SMBs. Search Engine Assist lets you offer it at scale without hiring specialists.

items.title: Natural attachment to your web portfolio
items.body: Every website customer is an SEO prospect. Bundle Search Engine Assist with websites, hosting, and OneList Plus for stronger product attachment and lower churn.

items.title: Recurring revenue with low support overhead
items.body: DIY, task-based design means SMBs self-serve month to month. Support demands stay low even across large customer bases.

items.title: Differentiate from basic hosting
items.body: Offering guided SEO alongside websites and listings positions you as a growth partner — not just an infrastructure provider.

lifecycleFit.heading: The Next Step After Getting Online
lifecycleFit.intro: Once an SMB has a website live, the next question is always: how do I get found? Search Engine Assist answers that question inside your ecosystem.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Website Builder, DIFM, or custom development launches their digital presence.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: Search Engine Assist guides SEO improvements month by month. Pair with OneList Plus and Reviews Promoter.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Ecommerce, email marketing, and advanced services fuel business growth.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position SEO as the natural next step after website launch, a bundle partner with directories and reputation management, and a recurring subscription that ties your value to measurable search performance.

cta.headline: Ready to Turn SEO into a Scalable Revenue Stream?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch Search Engine Assist under your brand, bundle it with your web and marketing portfolio, and help SMBs get found by the customers searching for them.
